meta.title: Stryvia — The intelligence you build with
meta.description: Bring a problem. Direct the work. The intelligence does the heavy lifting, and what comes out is yours. Stryvia gives you the capability to build, create, and solve at the speed a team used to require.
meta.ogAlt: Stryvia — the intelligence you build with

footer.coordinate: BUILT IN THE REGION · ENCRYPTED · YOURS TO OWN

scene1.headline: The thing you could never build without a team. Build it now.
scene1.subline: Bring a problem. Direct the work. The intelligence does the heavy lifting, and what comes out is yours.

scene3.headline: For as long as building anything meant assembling people, your ambition was capped by who you could afford to hire and wait for.
scene3.body: That cap is gone. You bring the problem. You make the decisions. The intelligence builds. You own what it makes. No team to assemble, no months to wait, no handing your idea to someone else and hoping.

scene4.headline: One model writes the script. None of them can also build the storyboard. Stryvia does both, as one piece of work.
scene4.body: Stryvia makes many models work together as one, so you get the whole thing finished and coherent, not five disconnected pieces you have to stitch yourself. That is the part no single tool can do.

scene5.headline: Whatever you bring, it gets built.
scene5.body: From a product to a venture to a campaign to a finance model to an operation. Different problems, one intelligence.

tiles.title: A product
tiles.note: From idea to something real and shippable.

tiles.title: A venture
tiles.note: The whole business, scoped and stood up.

tiles.title: A campaign
tiles.note: Concept to assets, ready to run.

tiles.title: A finance model
tiles.note: Numbers that hold up to scrutiny.

tiles.title: Whatever you bring
tiles.note: Not a menu. Bring the problem — it gets built.

scene5.action: Tell it what you want to build

scene6.headline: Six months and a team of five, or six weeks while you direct it.
scene6.body: The old way means hiring, briefing, coordinating, waiting, and paying for all of it. The Stryvia way means you start now, shape as you go, and pay for the capability, not the overhead.

scene7.control: You direct the work. Every decision that matters is yours.
scene7.ownership: You own what gets built. No lock-in, ever.
scene7.data: It is encrypted, handled to local standards, and kept in the region.
scene7.limits: When a problem is beyond what we should promise, we tell you.

doors: I have an idea I've never been able to build

scene9.quote: Creation should belong to the person who had the idea, not to whoever they could afford to hire.

scene10.headline: You've seen what it does. Tell it what you want to build.

chat.title: STRYVIA INTELLIGENCE
chat.emptyPrompt: Describe what you want to build or solve.
chat.placeholderShort: What do you want to build?
chips: Launch a product with no dev team
Open a business I don't understand yet
Fix an operation that's too manual
chat.thresholdBody: This one is past what I should responsibly scope on my own. The honest move is to bring in a person from Stryvia who can take it properly. Leave your details and they'll reach out.

handoff.title: Let's build this together
handoff.name: Your name
handoff.successBody: Your conversation is saved and on its way to a person who will reach out to build this with you.
handoff.errorRequired: Name and email are needed so we can reach you.
handoff.errorGeneric: Something went wrong sending that. Try once more.

chat.error: The connection dropped. Say that again and I'll pick it back up.
chat.newLine: Shift + Enter for a new line

earlyAccess.title: Be among the first to build with it.
earlyAccess.body: Not ready to start a full conversation? Request access and we'll bring you in.
earlyAccess.name: Your name
earlyAccess.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch.
earlyAccess.errorRequired: An email is needed so we can reach you.

common.talkItThrough: Talk it through in the chat

consent.text: We use analytics to understand how the site is used, with personal form fields masked. You can decline without affecting the site.
